title: Running in the Park
content: Every Tuesday morning, Liam goes running in the park before work. The air feels cool and fresh, and the streets are still quiet at that hour. He likes watching the sunrise while listening to music through his headphones. In the park, he passes dog walkers, cyclists, and other runners. Sometimes he stops near the lake to drink water and rest for a minute. Running helps Liam feel energetic and calm for the rest of the day. After finishing, he walks home slowly with a satisfied smile.
